steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1 says "On one hand, the dust can enhance ice clouds." Sentence 2 describes the opposite effect: dust weakens the storm. The two effects are contrary — that's the "complex and opposing effects" mentioned at the start.

steps.title: Pick the transition
steps.content:
"On one hand" demands its partner: On the other hand.

"In other words" rephrases (no rephrase here); "For example" instantiates; "Previously" is temporal — none capture the deliberate contrast.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
